task_yaml.task:
You are a tourist visiting Singapore on a business trip for the first time.
Plan for next Saturday, when you are free from 13:30 to 18:30, and the fixed
starting point is Raffles Place MRT Station. If next Saturday is a public
holiday, closed day, special-hours day, sold out, or the official pages do
not provide enough date-specific opening/admission information, use the
following Saturday instead and explain why. Use only the browser to create a
half-day travel plan. Candidate attractions are limited to National Gallery
Singapore, Gardens by the Bay, ArtScience Museum, and Singapore Botanic
Gardens.

You need to visit at least 2 official attraction websites to check opening
hours, last admission, and reservation/ticket rules for the selected date;
use a map webpage to check travel times from the starting point and between
attractions; find one candidate cafe webpage to confirm operating hours;
check one public transit/route webpage to verify the main route segment;
then write the result to:

    /tmp_workspace/results/singapore_sat_trip_5p.md

The final route must be 2 attractions plus 1 rest stop, and must satisfy:
total duration no more than 5 hours, each individual transfer preferably no
more than 35 minutes, and no location with clearly uncertain rules. The
Markdown must include: candidate checks, route timing, rest stop, final
itinerary, why rejected others. State the selected date in the final plan.
